title: Unit
description: A single combatant token in a zone.

name.description: Display name shown on the token arc.

tokenColor.description: CSS hex color for the token body cylinder. Defaults to dark red.

currentHP.description: Current hit points. Defaults to maxHP (full health).

tokenImageUrl.description: URL of the token portrait image.

facingAngle.description: Facing direction in radians. 0 = south (toward camera), π/2 = east, π = north, -π/2 = west. Omit for no facing indicator.

location.description: Position in map coordinates (feet). Origin is the lower-left corner of the map; x increases eastward, y increases northward.

tokenScale.description: Token size multiplier. 1.0 = standard 3-foot diameter. Use 0.75 for small creatures, 2.0 for large, 3.0 for huge.
